name: SRS (Simple Realtime Server)
description: SRS — high-performance OSS media server supporting RTMP, SRT, WebRTC, HLS

seo.title: SRS (Simple Realtime Server) — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: SRS (Simple Realtime Server): SRS — high-performance OSS media server supporting RTMP, SRT, WebRTC, HLS

when_to_use: High-performance OSS media server with RTMP, SRT, and WebRTC
Self-hosted live streaming origin with HLS output
Low-latency WebRTC delivery from RTMP ingest sources
Open-source Nginx-RTMP replacement with WebRTC support
Scalable media server for live streaming platforms in China

pros: Supports RTMP, HLS, SRT, WebRTC, HTTP-FLV
cons: Docs split between Chinese and English
You own all ops, scaling, and monitoring
Config can be daunting for newcomers
review.verdict: Best free OSS media server going — if you can run infra, SRS gives you Wowza-class features for zero license cost.
review.best_for: Engineering teams building self-hosted live streaming at significant scale.
review.not_for: Teams without streaming-ops expertise — managed SaaS is safer.
